member.name: T:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.Accordion
member.summary: A container component that displays collapsible content panes arranged vertically. Only one pane is expanded at a time (controlled by ). Emulates the Ajax Control Toolkit Accordion control.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.Accordion.SelectedIndex
member.summary: The zero-based index of the currently selected (expanded) pane. Set to -1 when no pane is expanded (only valid when is false).

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.Accordion.SelectedIndexChanged
member.summary: Raised when the selected pane index changes.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.Accordion.FadeTransitions
member.summary: Whether to use fade transitions when switching panes.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.Accordion.TransitionDuration
member.summary: Duration of expand/collapse animations in milliseconds. Default is 300.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.Accordion.HeaderCssClass
member.summary: CSS class applied to each pane header div.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.Accordion.ContentCssClass
member.summary: CSS class applied to each pane content div.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.Accordion.RequireOpenedPane
member.summary: Whether at least one pane must always be open. Default is true. When false, clicking the selected pane header collapses it.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.Accordion.AutoSize
member.summary: Specifies how pane content areas are automatically sized.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.Accordion.SuppressHeaderPostbacks
member.summary: Whether header clicks suppress postback behavior. Default is true.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.Accordion.CssClass
member.summary: CSS class applied to the outer Accordion container div.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.Accordion.ChildContent
member.summary: Child content containing components.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.Accordion.ContainerId
member.summary: Gets the unique DOM element ID for this Accordion container.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.Accordion.PaneCount
member.summary: Gets the number of registered panes.

member.name: T:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.AccordionPane
member.summary: Represents a single collapsible pane within an . Each pane has a clickable header and a content area that expands or collapses.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.AccordionPane.ParentAccordion
member.summary: The parent container, provided via CascadingParameter.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.AccordionPane.Header
member.summary: The header content for this pane. Rendered inside the clickable header div.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.AccordionPane.Content
member.summary: The body content for this pane. Rendered inside the collapsible content div.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.AccordionPane.HeaderId
member.summary: Gets the unique DOM element ID for this pane's header.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.AccordionPane.ContentId
member.summary: Gets the unique DOM element ID for this pane's content area.

member.name: T:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.AutoCompleteExtender
member.summary: Provides typeahead/autocomplete functionality for a target TextBox. Fetches suggestions via a Blazor EventCallback and renders a dropdown list with keyboard navigation support. Emulates the Ajax Control Toolkit AutoCompleteExtender.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.AutoCompleteExtender.ServicePath
member.summary: The URL of the web service providing completion data (for JS-based fetching).

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.AutoCompleteExtender.ServiceMethod
member.summary: The web service method name to call for completion data.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.AutoCompleteExtender.MinimumPrefixLength
member.summary: Minimum number of characters typed before suggestions are fetched. Default is 3.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.AutoCompleteExtender.CompletionSetCount
member.summary: Maximum number of suggestions to display. Default is 10.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.AutoCompleteExtender.CompletionInterval
member.summary: Time in milliseconds between keystrokes before fetching suggestions.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.AutoCompleteExtender.CompletionListCssClass
member.summary: CSS class applied to the completion list dropdown container.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.AutoCompleteExtender.CompletionListItemCssClass
member.summary: CSS class applied to each item in the completion list.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.AutoCompleteExtender.CompletionListHighlightedItemCssClass
member.summary: CSS class applied to the highlighted item in the completion list.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.AutoCompleteExtender.DelimiterCharacters
member.summary: Characters that delimit separate completion entries within the same text box.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.AutoCompleteExtender.FirstRowSelected
member.summary: Whether to automatically select the first item in the completion list.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.AutoCompleteExtender.ShowOnlyCurrentWordInCompletionListItem
member.summary: When true, shows only the current word in each completion list item instead of the full value.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.AutoCompleteExtender.OnClientItemSelected
member.summary: Client-side script invoked when an item is selected from the completion list.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.AutoCompleteExtender.OnClientPopulating
member.summary: Client-side script invoked before the completion list is populated.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.AutoCompleteExtender.OnClientPopulated
member.summary: Client-side script invoked after the completion list is populated.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.AutoCompleteExtender.CompletionDataRequested
member.summary: Blazor callback for requesting completion data server-side. The string parameter is the current prefix typed by the user.

member.name: T:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.BaseExtenderComponent
member.summary: Base class for Ajax Control Toolkit extender components. Extenders attach JavaScript behavior to a target control identified by without rendering any HTML of their own. JS modules are loaded as ES modules and manage behavior lifecycle.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.BaseExtenderComponent.TargetControlID
member.summary: The ID of the control this extender targets. Passed to JavaScript for DOM resolution via document.getElementById().

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.BaseExtenderComponent.BehaviorID
member.summary: Optional behavior identifier for JS-side lookup. Defaults to TargetControlID if not set.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.BaseExtenderComponent.Enabled
member.summary: Whether the extender behavior is active. Default is true.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.BaseExtenderComponent.JsModulePath
member.summary: Relative path to the JS ES module for this extender. Example: "./_content/BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents/js/confirm-button-extender.js"

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.BaseExtenderComponent.JsCreateFunction
member.summary: The exported JS function name that creates the behavior.

member.name: M:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.BaseExtenderComponent.GetBehaviorProperties
member.summary: Builds the property bag passed to the JS create/update functions.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.BaseExtenderComponent.ResolvedBehaviorID
member.summary: Resolved behavior ID: uses BehaviorID parameter if set, otherwise TargetControlID.

member.name: M:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.BaseExtenderComponent.UpdateBehaviorAsync
member.summary: Pushes updated properties to the JS behavior. Called by subclasses when parameters change after initial render.

member.name: T:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.CalendarExtender
member.summary: Attaches a popup calendar date picker to a target TextBox. Supports configurable date formats, navigation views, and date range constraints. Emulates the Ajax Control Toolkit CalendarExtender.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.CalendarExtender.Format
member.summary: The date format string used to display and parse dates (e.g., "MM/dd/yyyy").

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.CalendarExtender.PopupPosition
member.summary: The position of the popup calendar relative to the target control.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.CalendarExtender.DefaultView
member.summary: The default view when the calendar popup opens.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.CalendarExtender.StartDate
member.summary: The earliest selectable date. Dates before this are disabled.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.CalendarExtender.EndDate
member.summary: The latest selectable date. Dates after this are disabled.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.CalendarExtender.SelectedDate
member.summary: The currently selected date.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.CalendarExtender.TodaysDate
member.summary: The date highlighted as today. Defaults to the current date if not set.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.CalendarExtender.CssClass
member.summary: CSS class applied to the calendar popup container.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.CalendarExtender.OnClientDateSelectionChanged
member.summary: Client-side script invoked when a date is selected.

member.name: T:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.CollapsiblePanelExtender
member.summary: Adds collapsible behavior to a target panel, toggling between collapsed and expanded states with smooth CSS transitions. Supports separate collapse/expand triggers and dynamic label text. Emulates the Ajax Control Toolkit CollapsiblePanelExtender.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.CollapsiblePanelExtender.CollapseControlID
member.summary: The ID of the element that triggers collapse.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.CollapsiblePanelExtender.ExpandControlID
member.summary: The ID of the element that triggers expand. Can be the same as CollapseControlID for toggle behavior.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.CollapsiblePanelExtender.Collapsed
member.summary: Whether the panel starts in the collapsed state.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.CollapsiblePanelExtender.CollapsedSize
member.summary: The height (or width for horizontal) in pixels when collapsed. 0 means fully hidden.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.CollapsiblePanelExtender.ExpandedSize
member.summary: The height (or width for horizontal) in pixels when expanded. 0 means auto-size.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.CollapsiblePanelExtender.CollapsedText
member.summary: Text displayed in the TextLabelID element when the panel is collapsed.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.CollapsiblePanelExtender.ExpandedText
member.summary: Text displayed in the TextLabelID element when the panel is expanded.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.CollapsiblePanelExtender.TextLabelID
member.summary: The ID of the element whose text content changes to reflect collapsed/expanded state.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.CollapsiblePanelExtender.ExpandDirection
member.summary: The direction of the collapse/expand animation.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.CollapsiblePanelExtender.AutoCollapse
member.summary: Whether to automatically collapse the panel when the mouse leaves.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.CollapsiblePanelExtender.AutoExpand
member.summary: Whether to automatically expand the panel when the mouse enters.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.CollapsiblePanelExtender.ScrollContents
member.summary: Whether to enable scrolling within the panel when content overflows.

member.name: T:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.ConfirmButtonExtender
member.summary: Attaches a confirmation dialog to a target button. When the user clicks the target, a browser confirm() prompt appears. If the user cancels, the click event is suppressed. Emulates the Ajax Control Toolkit ConfirmButtonExtender.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.ConfirmButtonExtender.ConfirmText
member.summary: The confirmation message displayed to the user.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.ConfirmButtonExtender.ConfirmOnFormSubmit
member.summary: Whether to confirm on form submit instead of button click.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.ConfirmButtonExtender.DisplayModalPopupID
member.summary: Optional ID of a ModalPopup to display instead of browser confirm(). Not implemented in v1 — reserved for future use.

member.name: T:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.Enums.AcceptNegative
member.summary: Specifies how negative values are accepted in the MaskedEditExtender.

member.name: T:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.Enums.AutoSizeMode
member.summary: Specifies how the Accordion automatically sizes its content panes.

member.name: F:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.Enums.AutoSizeMode.None
member.summary: No automatic sizing. Panes use their natural height.

member.name: F:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.Enums.AutoSizeMode.Fill
member.summary: Panes are sized to fill the available space in the Accordion container.

member.name: F:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.Enums.AutoSizeMode.Limit
member.summary: Panes are limited to the Accordion container height but do not expand to fill it.

member.name: T:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.Enums.CalendarDefaultView
member.summary: Specifies the default view when the calendar popup opens.

member.name: T:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.Enums.CalendarPosition
member.summary: Specifies the position of the calendar popup relative to the target control.

member.name: T:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.Enums.ExpandDirection
member.summary: Specifies the direction in which a CollapsiblePanelExtender expands or collapses.

member.name: T:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.Enums.FilterMode
member.summary: Specifies whether the FilteredTextBoxExtender uses ValidChars or InvalidChars.

member.name: T:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.Enums.FilterType
member.summary: Specifies the types of characters to allow in a FilteredTextBoxExtender. This is a flags enum — values can be combined.

member.name: T:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.Enums.InputDirection
member.summary: Specifies the direction of input for the MaskedEditExtender.

member.name: T:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.Enums.MaskType
member.summary: Specifies the type of mask applied by the MaskedEditExtender.

member.name: T:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.Enums.PopupPosition
member.summary: Specifies the position of a popup relative to its target control.

member.name: T:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.Enums.SliderOrientation
member.summary: Specifies the orientation of a SliderExtender control.

member.name: T:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.FilteredTextBoxExtender
member.summary: Restricts input in a target TextBox to specified character sets. Filters keystrokes in real-time and strips invalid characters on paste. Emulates the Ajax Control Toolkit FilteredTextBoxExtender.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.FilteredTextBoxExtender.FilterType
member.summary: The types of characters to allow. Can be combined as flags.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.FilteredTextBoxExtender.ValidChars
member.summary: Additional valid characters when FilterType includes Custom.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.FilteredTextBoxExtender.InvalidChars
member.summary: Characters to explicitly block.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.FilteredTextBoxExtender.FilterMode
member.summary: Whether ValidChars or InvalidChars takes precedence.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.FilteredTextBoxExtender.FilterInterval
member.summary: Milliseconds interval for filtering. Default is 250.

member.name: T:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.HoverMenuExtender
member.summary: Displays a popup panel when the user hovers over a target control. Supports configurable show/hide delays, positional placement, and hover CSS styling. Emulates the Ajax Control Toolkit HoverMenuExtender.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.HoverMenuExtender.PopupControlID
member.summary: The ID of the panel element to display as a hover menu.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.HoverMenuExtender.PopupPosition
member.summary: The position of the popup relative to the target control.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.HoverMenuExtender.OffsetX
member.summary: Horizontal offset in pixels from the calculated position.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.HoverMenuExtender.OffsetY
member.summary: Vertical offset in pixels from the calculated position.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.HoverMenuExtender.PopDelay
member.summary: Delay in milliseconds before showing the popup after mouse enters the target.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.HoverMenuExtender.HoverDelay
member.summary: Delay in milliseconds before hiding the popup after mouse leaves the target and popup.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.HoverMenuExtender.HoverCssClass
member.summary: CSS class applied to the target control while the hover menu is visible.

member.name: T:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.MaskedEditExtender
member.summary: Applies an input mask to a target TextBox, restricting and formatting user input according to a mask pattern. Supports number, date, time, and custom masks. Emulates the Ajax Control Toolkit MaskedEditExtender.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.MaskedEditExtender.Mask
member.summary: The mask pattern string (e.g., "999-999-9999" for phone numbers). 9 = digit, L = letter, $ = digit or space, C = any character, A = letter or digit.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.MaskedEditExtender.MaskType
member.summary: The type of mask to apply.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.MaskedEditExtender.InputDirection
member.summary: The direction of text input within the mask.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.MaskedEditExtender.PromptCharacter
member.summary: The character displayed for unfilled mask positions. Default is "_".

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.MaskedEditExtender.AutoComplete
member.summary: Whether to enable browser autocomplete on the target input.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.MaskedEditExtender.AutoCompleteValue
member.summary: The value to use for autocomplete when AutoComplete is enabled.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.MaskedEditExtender.Filtered
member.summary: Additional characters allowed beyond the mask definition.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.MaskedEditExtender.ClearMaskOnLostFocus
member.summary: Whether to remove the mask characters when the input loses focus, showing only the raw value.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.MaskedEditExtender.ClearTextOnInvalid
member.summary: Whether to clear the text when it does not match the mask on lost focus.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.MaskedEditExtender.AcceptAMPM
member.summary: Whether to accept AM/PM designator for time masks.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.MaskedEditExtender.AcceptNegative
member.summary: How negative values are displayed for number masks.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.MaskedEditExtender.ErrorTooltipEnabled
member.summary: Whether to show a tooltip with error information when validation fails.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.MaskedEditExtender.ErrorTooltipCssClass
member.summary: CSS class applied to the error tooltip.

member.name: T:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.ModalPopupExtender
member.summary: Displays a target element as a modal popup with an overlay backdrop. Supports OK/Cancel buttons, focus trapping, drag support, and Escape key dismissal. Emulates the Ajax Control Toolkit ModalPopupExtender.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.ModalPopupExtender.PopupControlID
member.summary: The ID of the element to display as a modal popup.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.ModalPopupExtender.BackgroundCssClass
member.summary: CSS class applied to the overlay backdrop behind the modal.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.ModalPopupExtender.OkControlID
member.summary: The ID of the control that confirms and closes the modal (OK action).

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.ModalPopupExtender.CancelControlID
member.summary: The ID of the control that cancels and closes the modal.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.ModalPopupExtender.OnOkScript
member.summary: JavaScript to execute when the modal is dismissed via the OK control.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.ModalPopupExtender.OnCancelScript
member.summary: JavaScript to execute when the modal is dismissed via the Cancel control or Escape key.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.ModalPopupExtender.DropShadow
member.summary: Whether to add a drop shadow effect to the popup.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.ModalPopupExtender.Drag
member.summary: Whether the popup can be dragged by the user.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.ModalPopupExtender.PopupDragHandleControlID
member.summary: The ID of the element used as a drag handle when Drag is enabled. If not set, the entire popup is draggable.

member.name: T:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.NumericUpDownExtender
member.summary: Adds numeric up/down spinner buttons to a target TextBox. Supports min/max range, step increments, and cycling through a reference value list. Emulates the Ajax Control Toolkit NumericUpDownExtender.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.NumericUpDownExtender.Width
member.summary: The width of the spinner control in pixels.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.NumericUpDownExtender.Minimum
member.summary: The minimum allowed value.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.NumericUpDownExtender.Maximum
member.summary: The maximum allowed value.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.NumericUpDownExtender.Step
member.summary: The amount to increment or decrement on each step. Default is 1.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.NumericUpDownExtender.RefValues
member.summary: Semicolon-separated list of values to cycle through instead of numeric stepping. When set, the up/down buttons cycle through these values in order.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.NumericUpDownExtender.ServiceUpPath
member.summary: URL of the web service to call for the up action.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.NumericUpDownExtender.ServiceUpMethod
member.summary: Web service method name for the up action.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.NumericUpDownExtender.ServiceDownPath
member.summary: URL of the web service to call for the down action.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.NumericUpDownExtender.ServiceDownMethod
member.summary: Web service method name for the down action.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.NumericUpDownExtender.Tag
member.summary: An arbitrary string value passed to the web service methods.

member.name: T:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.PopupControlExtender
member.summary: Attaches a popup panel to a target control, displaying it on click. Lighter than ModalPopupExtender — no overlay, no focus trap. Supports positional placement, commit property/script, and outside-click dismissal. Emulates the Ajax Control Toolkit PopupControlExtender.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.PopupControlExtender.PopupControlID
member.summary: The ID of the panel element to display as a popup.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.PopupControlExtender.Position
member.summary: The position of the popup relative to the target control.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.PopupControlExtender.OffsetX
member.summary: Horizontal offset in pixels from the calculated position.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.PopupControlExtender.OffsetY
member.summary: Vertical offset in pixels from the calculated position.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.PopupControlExtender.CommitProperty
member.summary: The property name on the target control to set when the popup is committed. Typically "value" for input elements.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.PopupControlExtender.CommitScript
member.summary: JavaScript to execute when the popup is committed (a value is selected).

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.PopupControlExtender.ExtenderControlID
member.summary: The ID of this extender control for programmatic access.

member.name: T:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.SliderExtender
member.summary: Attaches range slider behavior to a target input element. Supports horizontal/vertical orientation, bound control synchronization, and customizable rail/handle appearance via CSS classes or image URLs. Emulates the Ajax Control Toolkit SliderExtender.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.SliderExtender.Minimum
member.summary: The minimum value of the slider range.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.SliderExtender.Maximum
member.summary: The maximum value of the slider range.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.SliderExtender.Steps
member.summary: The number of discrete steps in the slider range. 0 means continuous.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.SliderExtender.Value
member.summary: The current value of the slider.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.SliderExtender.BoundControlID
member.summary: The ID of another element whose value is synchronized with the slider value.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.SliderExtender.Orientation
member.summary: The orientation of the slider (Horizontal or Vertical).

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.SliderExtender.RailCssClass
member.summary: CSS class applied to the slider rail/track element.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.SliderExtender.HandleCssClass
member.summary: CSS class applied to the slider handle element.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.SliderExtender.HandleImageUrl
member.summary: URL of an image to use for the slider handle.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.SliderExtender.Length
member.summary: The length of the slider in pixels.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.SliderExtender.Decimals
member.summary: The number of decimal places for the slider value.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.SliderExtender.TooltipText
member.summary: Tooltip text displayed when hovering over the slider handle. Use {0} as a placeholder for the current value.

member.name: T:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.TabContainer
member.summary: A container component that displays content in tabbed panels. Only the active tab's content is visible. Clicking a tab header switches the active tab. Emulates the Ajax Control Toolkit TabContainer control.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.TabContainer.ActiveTabIndex
member.summary: The zero-based index of the currently active tab.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.TabContainer.OnActiveTabChanged
member.summary: Raised when the active tab changes.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.TabContainer.OnClientActiveTabChanged
member.summary: Name of a client-side JavaScript function to invoke when the active tab changes. The function receives the new tab index as its argument.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.TabContainer.ScrollBars
member.summary: Specifies which scrollbars to display on the tab content area.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.TabContainer.CssClass
member.summary: CSS class applied to the outer TabContainer div.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.TabContainer.ChildContent
member.summary: Child content containing components.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.TabContainer.ContainerId
member.summary: Gets the unique DOM element ID for this TabContainer.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.TabContainer.PanelCount
member.summary: Gets the number of registered tab panels.

member.name: T:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.TabPanel
member.summary: Represents a single tab within a . Each tab has a header (text or template) and a content area.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.TabPanel.ParentContainer
member.summary: The parent , provided via CascadingParameter.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.TabPanel.HeaderText
member.summary: The text displayed in this tab's header. Used when is not set.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.TabPanel.HeaderTemplate
member.summary: Custom header content for this tab. When set, takes precedence over .

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.TabPanel.ContentTemplate
member.summary: The content rendered in the tab panel body when this tab is active.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.TabPanel.Enabled
member.summary: Whether this tab can be selected. Default is true. Disabled tabs are rendered but cannot be clicked.

member.name: T:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.ToggleButtonExtender
member.summary: Replaces a target checkbox with a clickable image that toggles between checked and unchecked states. Supports separate images for checked, unchecked, hover, and disabled states. Emulates the Ajax Control Toolkit ToggleButtonExtender.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.ToggleButtonExtender.ImageWidth
member.summary: The width of the toggle image in pixels.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.ToggleButtonExtender.ImageHeight
member.summary: The height of the toggle image in pixels.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.ToggleButtonExtender.UncheckedImageUrl
member.summary: URL of the image displayed when the checkbox is unchecked.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.ToggleButtonExtender.CheckedImageUrl
member.summary: URL of the image displayed when the checkbox is checked.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.ToggleButtonExtender.UncheckedImageAlternateText
member.summary: Alternate text for the unchecked image (accessibility).

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.ToggleButtonExtender.CheckedImageAlternateText
member.summary: Alternate text for the checked image (accessibility).

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.ToggleButtonExtender.CheckedImageOverUrl
member.summary: URL of the image displayed on hover when the checkbox is checked.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.ToggleButtonExtender.UncheckedImageOverUrl
member.summary: URL of the image displayed on hover when the checkbox is unchecked.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.ToggleButtonExtender.DisabledUncheckedImageUrl
member.summary: URL of the image displayed when the checkbox is disabled and unchecked.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.ToggleButtonExtender.DisabledCheckedImageUrl
member.summary: URL of the image displayed when the checkbox is disabled and checked.
